zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Davenport於1460年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾普倫德加斯特時，她的父親John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire41歲，母親Joan Margaret Bagot31歲。她於1500年與Richard Waldron在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1515年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特聖 德庫曼也斯享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Davenport于1460年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾普倫德加斯特时，她的父亲John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire41岁，母亲Joan Margaret Bagot31岁。她于1500年与Richard Waldron在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1515年在英国英格兰薩默塞特聖 德庫曼也斯享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Davenport was born in 1460, in Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire, was 41 and her mother, Joan Margaret Bagot, was 31. She married Richard Waldron in 1500, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1515, in St Decuman's, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Davenport est née en 1460, à Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joan Margaret Bagot, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Waldron en 1500, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1515, à St Decuman's, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Davenport 1460 in Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire 41 und ihre Mutter Joan Margaret Bagot 31. Sie hat 1500 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Richard Waldron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1515 im Alter von 55 Jahren in St Decuman's, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Davenportが1460年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアプレンデルガストで生まれた時，父John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquireは41歳，母Joan Margaret Bagotは31歳であった。1500年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでRichard Waldronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1515年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトスト デクウマン'スで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Davenport(이)가 1460년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 플렌더가스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Margaret Bagot(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Richard Waldron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 스트 데쿠먼'스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Davenport родилась в 1460 г. в местности прендиргаст, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Margaret Bagot, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Waldron в 1500 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1515 г. в местности ст декуман'с, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.
